prompt: ultrawork+ralph [Implement three additions to Regulex Intelligence: 1. Connected Intelligence reframing of existing modules 2. Intelligence Overview page at /intelligence 3. Market Intelligence fund impact upgrade Read design-system/MASTER.md fully — specifically Sections G, H, and I in "CONNECTED INTELLIGENCE, OVERVIEW PAGE & MARKET INTELLIGENCE EXTENSION". Every decision is there. --- ## PHASE 1: UPDATE MOCK DATA 1a. Update lib/intelligence-mock-data.ts Add these new types and data exports: FundImpact type: fundName: string impactLevel: "POSITIVE_HIGH" | "POSITIVE_MODERATE" | "POSITIVE_LOW" | "NEUTRAL" | "WATCH" | "RISK" | "RISK_HIGH" | "POSITIVE_CONTRAST" direction: "up" | "down" | "neutral" | "warning" why: string whatToSay: string MarketEventWithImpact type: Extends existing MarketEvent with: fundImpacts: FundImpact[] (5 entries, one per fund) ifaOutreach: IFAOutreachRow[] topPositive: string (fund name) topConcern: string (fund name) IFAOutreachRow type: firmName: string reason: string mandateRelevant: string lastContactDays: number priority: "URGENT" | "HIGH" | "MODERATE" Export: marketEventsWithImpact: MarketEventWithImpact[] Wire in ALL 25 data points (5 events × 5 funds) from MASTER.md Section I1 verbatim. Every "why" and "whatToSay" string exactly as written. Wire in 5 IFA outreach rows for BoE rate hold event from MASTER.md Section I3 exactly. Add for Intelligence Overview page: overviewStats: OverviewStat[] (4 stats from Section H2) signalStreamData: SignalDay[] (7 days, Section H4 data) competitorHeatmapData: HeatmapRow[] (5 rows × 8 columns) moduleActivityCards: ModuleCard[] (6 cards, Section H5) recentSignals: RecentSignal[] (10 signals, Section H6) IFA scatter data (200+ firms for the hero chart): 25 named firms with full data (from existing ifaRankings) 175 universe firms: generate with these properties: id: "universe-{n}" name: "IFA Firm {n}" fitScore: random 5-65 (below the actionable threshold) signalRecencyDays: random 14-90 estimatedAUM_m: random 50-2000 isUniverse: true (renders as grey dot, no label) The 175 universe firms create the visual cloud of grey dots that makes the amber bubbles pop. 1b. Add to lib/intelligence-mock-data.ts: platformHeatmap data: all 8 platforms × 5 mandates with competitorCount and keyridgePresent boolean per cell (exact data from MASTER.md Section H4 right column) --- ## PHASE 2: CONNECTED INTELLIGENCE REFRAMING 2a. Update sidebar section label In components/dashboard/sidebar.tsx: Change "OVERVIEW" section label to "CONNECTED INTELLIGENCE" The label is longer — verify it fits at 240px sidebar width. If it wraps, abbreviate to "CONNECTED" with a tooltip showing "Connected Intelligence" on hover. Apply exact styling from MASTER.md Section G1. 2b. Create components/dashboard/connected-data-strip.tsx This component goes on every Connected Intelligence page. Per MASTER.md Section G2 spec exactly. Props: none (hardcoded for prototype) Six system pills: Salesforce CRM, Aladdin PMS, Bloomberg, LSEG, Morningstar, Outlook "Why connected data? →" link opens ConnectedDataExplainer panel (2c). Height: 36px. Exact spec per G2. 2c. Create components/dashboard/connected-data-explainer.tsx Slide-over panel, 400px, right-anchored. Per MASTER.md Section G3 spec exactly. Props: isOpen: boolean, onClose: () => void Three numbered sections with content from G3. "Explore Intelligence Modules →" button → router.push('/intelligence') "Request Integration Setup" → placeholder href="#" 2d. Add ConnectedDataStrip to all 5 existing module pages: In each of these pages, add immediately below the topbar (above page header): app/page.tsx (Morning Brief) app/priorities/page.tsx (Priority Queue) app/clients/page.tsx (Client Intelligence) app/flows/page.tsx (Flow Intelligence) app/rfp/page.tsx (RFP Intelligence) 2e. Add "Connected intelligence" indicator to page headers In each of the 5 pages above, next to the page title add: Connected intelligence Position: right of page title, flex row, items-center. --- ## PHASE 3: INTELLIGENCE OVERVIEW PAGE 3a. Create app/intelligence/page.tsx This is the landing page for the Intelligence section. Route: /intelligence When user clicks "Intelligence" section in sidebar nav, this page loads (not any individual module). Update sidebar nav: clicking the "INTELLIGENCE" section label should route to /intelligence, not just expand the section. If the section is already expanded, it still routes to /intelligence. Page state: timeRange: "7D" | "30D" | "90D" (default "7D") selectedMandate: string (default "Global Systematic") — this filters the IFA scatter hoveredBubble: IFAFirm | null hoveredSignal: RecentSignal | null Page structure (per MASTER.md Section H): H1: Page header Left: page-title + headline stat sentence Right: time range tabs (7D/30D/90D, same tab component) H2: 4 stat cards (stat-card component, compact variant) Use existing stat-card but apply a smaller data value size (data-lg instead of data-xl for this more compact context) H3: Hero IFA Opportunity Scatter Full-width. Height: 380px. Implement using Recharts ScatterChart: - CustomDot: renders a circle with size based on AUM, colour based on opportunity level (amber/orange/slate/border) - 25 named firms: rendered with labels below bubble - 175 universe firms: rendered as small grey dots, no labels - Quadrant zones: 4 divs with absolute positioning, very faint tinted backgrounds, zone labels in corners - Custom tooltip: show on hover of any bubble - "Act Now" zone label (top-left): absolute positioned, card-label style, amber text - Mandate filter dropdown: above the chart, right-aligned Changing mandate re-sorts and recolours bubbles (in prototype: just changes the label, not actual data) X axis: Risk Score 0-100 → renamed to "Mandate Fit Score" Y axis: Days inverted → Signal Recency (0d at top = most recent = most urgent) Bubble colour logic: fitScore > 80 AND signalRecencyDays < 7: bg-accent (amber) fitScore > 70 AND signalRecencyDays < 14: warning colour fitScore > 55 AND signalRecencyDays < 30: neutral colour else: border-strong colour (very muted) isUniverse: true → always border colour at 40% opacity Bubble size: Math.sqrt(estimatedAUM_m / 10) * 4 Clamp between 6px (min) and 26px (max radius) Pass as r prop to circle Labelled bubbles (show name + "Xd ago" for top 5): Paradigm Capital, Attivo Group, Foster Denovo, Progeny Wealth, Informed Financial Planning Label: rendered as CustomLabel below each bubble Only these 5 get labels to avoid clutter Below chart (inside container): "23 actionable opportunities this week. Top recommendation: Paradigm Capital — act within 48 hours." body-sm. Amber on "48 hours" (Geist Mono). H4: Two-column section (50/50, gap-6) LEFT: Signal Stream Timeline 7 columns (Mon-Sun), signals as coloured dots. Implement with: - 7 day columns in a flex row, equal width - Day label above (caption, Geist Mono) - Dots: 10px circles, stacked vertically, 4px gap - Each dot: background = module colour at 80% opacity - Hover on dot: show tooltip with signal text - Overflow (>8 dots): show "+X more" caption below stack Wire signalStreamData from mock data. Colour legend below: 6 items, flex row, gap-4, wrapping allowed Coloured dot + module name in caption RIGHT: Competitive Pressure Heatmap 5×8 matrix. Implement as a CSS grid (5 rows × 8 columns): - Each cell: 32×32px (or slightly wider if space allows) - Background: determined by competitorCount (heatmap logic) - Top-right corner dot: green if keyridgePresent, red if not - Cell content: competitorCount in data-sm Geist Mono - Row labels: mandate names, left-aligned, body-sm - Column headers: platform abbreviations, caption Geist Mono Wire platformHeatmap data from mock data. Below matrix: "2 priority gaps: Hargreaves Lansdown and AJ Bell" danger-text on specific numbers. "View Platform Flow →" ghost link → router.push('/intelligence/platform-flow') H5: Module Activity Cards (CSS grid, 3 columns, 2 rows) 6 ModuleCard components. Wire moduleActivityCards from mock data. Each card links to its module route on click. Full card is clickable (cursor-pointer, hover border-strong). H6: Recent Signals Feed 10 RecentSignal rows. Wire recentSignals from mock data. Module colour dot per signal (same colour system as H4). 3b. Create components/intelligence/module-card.tsx Per MASTER.md Section H5 spec. Props: ModuleCard (icon, name, stat, signal, timestamp, route) Full card clickable. Hover effect: border-strong transition. 3c. Create components/intelligence/iFA-scatter.tsx The IFA Opportunity Scatter component. Props: firms: IFAFirm[], selectedMandate: string Used on the overview page. Self-contained — takes data, renders the scatter with all quadrant zones, labels, and hover behaviour. 3d. Create components/intelligence/signal-stream.tsx Props: signalDays: SignalDay[] The 7-day timeline with coloured dots. Self-contained. 3e. Create components/intelligence/heatmap.tsx Props: rows: HeatmapRow[], columns: string[] The competitive pressure matrix. Self-contained. --- ## PHASE 4: MARKET INTELLIGENCE UPGRADE 4a. Create components/intelligence/fund-impact-table.tsx Per MASTER.md Section I2 spec exactly. Props: eventName: string fundImpacts: FundImpact[] onFundSelect: (fund: FundImpact) => void State: expandedFund: string | null selectedFund: FundImpact | null Table: 5 rows (one per fund), 4 columns per I2 spec. Impact badges: colours per impact level from MASTER.md I2. Direction indicator: ↑ ↓ → ⚠ in appropriate colours. "Why" text: truncated to 2 lines, expand on click. When row selected → shows "What to Say" panel below: bg-accent-subtle, border-l-2 border-accent Talking point text (whatToSay from data) "Copy talking point" button (clipboard API) "Personalise →" link → router.push('/intelligence/ai-research') 4b. Create components/intelligence/outreach-window.tsx The "⏱ Best outreach window" strip from Section I3. Props: hours: string (e.g., "24-48") Shown only on Market Intelligence module pages. 4c. Update event feed items in Market Intelligence In app/intelligence/market-intelligence/page.tsx, update event list items to show the fund impact chips per MASTER.md Section I4: After each event headline, add chips row: topPositive fund → success chip with fund name + ↑ topConcern fund → danger chip with fund name + ↓ Chips: caption, px-1.5 py-0.5, rounded-sm bg at 8% opacity of their semantic colour 4d. Update Market Intelligence right panel When an event is selected, the right panel now shows: [Existing: event summary card] [Existing: outreach window strip — NEW] [NEW: FundImpactTable component for this event] [Existing: IFA Outreach Intelligence table — UPDATED] IFA Outreach table: Wire the 5 IFA rows from Section I3 for BoE event. For other events: show first 3 rows with generic data (reuse existing mock IFA data). Last Contact column: colour-coded per existing spec. Priority badge: URGENT (danger) / HIGH (warning) / MODERATE (neutral). --- ## PHASE 5: VERIFICATION 5a. npm run build — zero errors. 5b. Connected Intelligence check: All 5 existing module pages show ConnectedDataStrip "Connected intelligence" indicator visible in page headers Sidebar section label shows "CONNECTED INTELLIGENCE" "Why connected data? →" panel opens and closes correctly "Explore Intelligence Modules →" button routes to /intelligence 5c. Intelligence Overview check: /intelligence renders without errors 4 stat cards show correct values (10,847 visible) IFA Scatter: 25 named bubbles render with correct colours 175 grey universe dots visible (creates cloud effect) "Act Now" quadrant label visible (amber, top-left) Hover tooltip shows on named bubbles Paradigm Capital is amber bubble in top-left quadrant Labelled bubbles show name and signal age Signal Stream: 7 columns, coloured dots, hover tooltip Heatmap: 5×8 grid renders, HL column shows red dots on Global Systematic, UK Balanced, Abs Return 6 module cards render and link correctly 10 recent signals show with correct module colours 5d. Zero regression check: Morning Brief: still loads, still shows client cards Priority Queue: still loads, silent accounts callout visible Client Intelligence: still loads, tabs work Flow Intelligence: still loads, gap table visible RFP Intelligence: still loads, win rate panel visible All 6 Intelligence modules: still load on their routes 5f. Design audit: No raw hex values or raw Tailwind colour defaults Geist Mono on all data throughout all new components ConnectedDataStrip appears on CONNECTED INTELLIGENCE pages ConnectedDataStrip does NOT appear on INTELLIGENCE pages --- ## COMPLETION CRITERIA Output COMPLETE only when ALL pass: □ npm run build: zero errors □ ConnectedDataStrip on all 5 existing module pages □ "CONNECTED INTELLIGENCE" section label in sidebar □ Connected data explainer panel opens/closes □ /intelligence page renders completely □ IFA scatter: 25 named + 175 universe bubbles visible □ Paradigm Capital amber bubble in top-left quadrant □ "Act Now" zone label visible (amber) □ Signal stream: 7 days, coloured dots, hover tooltip □ Heatmap: HL column red dots on correct rows □ All 6 module activity cards render and link □ 10 recent signals with module colours □ Fund impact table renders for BoE event (5 rows) □ "What to Say" panel opens on row click □ Outreach window strip visible on Market Intelligence □ Fund impact chips on event feed items □ All 5 existing module pages: zero regressions □ All 6 Intelligence module pages: zero regressions Ralph mode.
